```r
rew_h_cdni$state <-'CD_noninflamed_treated'
rew_cc <- rbind(rew_h_i,rew_h_ni,rew_h_na,rew_h_cdi,rew_h_cdni) |> mutate(disease = case_when(
  state == 'UC_inflamed_naive' ~ as.character('UC'),
  state == 'UC_inflamed_treated' ~ as.character('UC'),
  state == 'UC_noninflamed_treated' ~ as.character('UC'),
  state == 'CD_inflamed_treated' ~ as.character('CD'),
  state == 'CD_noninflamed_treated' ~ as.character('CD'),
)) |> dplyr::filter(name != 'CD70')
rew_cc |>group_by(disease)|> wilcox_test(Dnc ~ state)
```
